title: Unique Party 1944 - Silver Twist Birthday Candles, Pack of 10
features: Pack of 10 Silver Twist Birthday Candles
Spiral Candles each measure approximately 6cm (2.5") in height
Ideal for decorating cakes, cupcakes and other baked goods at a birthday party or silver wedding anniversary celebration
Silver candles can be used alone, or mixed with number candles, cake decorations or cake bunting for extra festive flair
Coordinate with other birthday party supplies and party decorations from Unique Party
description: Product Description Add a touch of majestic style to your celebration cake with these elegant Silver Twist Birthday Candles. Featuring a rich, metallic silver colour, these spiral-shaped candles are sure to attract attention from guests at your birthday party, silver wedding anniversary or other special celebration. Use them to put a festive finish to any homemade or store-bought treat, whether it's a traditional celebration cake, or a batch of cupcakes. These party candles look great alone, but can also be easily paired with other coloured candles, number candles, cake banners or bunting to add that extra bit of decorative flair. Box Contains 1 x 10 SILVER SPIRAL BDAY CANDLE
